text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon doesn't show up for today's training.
Worried, I go looking for her...

I spot her walking out of the music store in front
of the station.
choice_data_list: Someone looks like they're in a good mood.
Someone looks like they're in a good mood.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey, Trainer! Yeah, I'm in a fabulous mood!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I just bought the newest release from Gold ☆
White! They're my favorite idol group!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: This album in particular is so cute! From the songs to the album art, right down to their outfits! Sigh... They're just the best...
choice_data_list: ...So much so that you forgot about training?

text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon apologizes sweetly. However, that
isn't enough to get her out of trouble. I give her a
good talking-to.
